name: OpenPosterDB
description: Fetches posters, backdrops, logos and episode stills (with rating badges) from a self-hosted OpenPosterDB / RPDB-compatible instance, by each item's IMDb / TMDB / TVDB id.
overview: Rating-badge artwork from a self-hosted OpenPosterDB instance.

versions.changelog: Initial release: Movie, Series and Episode remote image providers (poster, backdrop, logo, episode still). Configurable Base URL + API key.
